item.title: Scores for 2026-07-10
item.description: Pot limit Omaha Hi-Lo Place User Points 1 Nana_Sharon 12,000 2 bill 10,000 3 PaPaLarry 8,000 4 patc 6,000 5 Kevin 4,000 6 Maryjean 2,000 7 Norma1 1,000 No limit Omaha Hi-Lo Place User Points 1 bill 12,000 2 Maryjean 10,000 3 Kevin 8,000 4 Nana_Sharon 6,000 5 PaPaLarry 4,000 6 patc 2,000 7 Norma1 1,000 Larry's Special Place User Points 1 Maryjean 12,000 2 patc 10,000 3 Norma1 8,000 4 PaPaLarry 6,000 5 bill 4,000 6 Nana_Sharon 2,000 7 Kevin 1,000 Month Point Totals Place User Points 1 bill 26,000 2 Maryjean 24,000 3 Nana_Sharon 20,000 4t PaPaLarry 18,000 4t patc 18,000 6 Kevin 13,000 7 Norma1 10,000
